title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Celebi India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Celebi India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Celebi India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Celebi India:
Celebi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
